Winner-Take-All Dynamics

Real-time Architecture

Purpose-built for emergency latency (< 50ms). Difficult for generic ERPs or manual aggregators to replicate.

Technology Barrier

Data Intelligence

Proprietary demand data enables predictive supply management, moving from reactive to proactive care.

IP Barrier

Early Partnerships

First-mover advantage with key hospital chains and state governments creates exclusive corridors.

Market Barrier

High Switching Costs

Deep API integration into hospital HMIS workflows makes displacement operationally painful.

Retention Barrier
